title: More of the Mods
description:
A Vanilla+ Fabric Modpack running on 1.21


From adding Mob Vote Loosers to making the game harder the more players playing on a server, everything is in here!
body:
**A Vanilla+ Fabric Modpack running on the latest Version of Minecraft**


From adding Mob Vote Loosers to making the game harder the more players playing on a server, everything is in here!

Search new Dungeons, create an Inventory Network, craft gear better than Netherite and explore the new Biomes from Biomes O' Plenty and BetterX

 

And now, have fun!
